_comment: outline theme (Research Notebook) — text-focused, no image panel. v3.0.0: PPT-engine features (TOC drawer, NarrationEngine v2.4, FullscreenManager, transitions, @media print, keyboard shortcuts). Full-width content area, no right-panel. All styles compatible.
name: outline
description: Research notebook theme — text-focused presentation with headline + bullet structure. No image panel; full width dedicated to text content. Designed for researchers and academics who present structured content with minimal visual distractions.

rendering.navigation: TOC drawer + footer bar — prev/next, transition mode selector, script toggle, timer, TTS controls

content_rules.notes: Research-oriented outline style. Titles up to 35 chars. Max 6 bullets per slide. Images and diagrams are NOT displayed. Focus on structured text content.

recommended_structure.notes: Outline-style optimized for structured, information-dense presentations. Divider slides mark chapter sections.

author: co-deck
